entry.title: Fly Client Proposal
entry.summary:
Fly clients present an innovative approach in blockchain technology, enhancing efficiency over traditional light clients. They operate under similar trust assumptions as standard light clients, relying on the integrity of the merkle root, which is confirmed through substantial proof of work. This design assumes that the cost and effort required to falsify this proof would be prohibitive, especially considering that such resources could instead be used for mining legitimate bitcoin.
One significant advantage of fly clients is their initialization process, which requires downloading only a constant, limited number of block headers. This contrasts with standard light clients, which must acquire potentially numerous headers depending on the blockchain's length. By reducing the number of required downloads, fly clients not only streamline the initiation process but also potentially increase overall operational efficiency. This attribute makes them particularly appealing in scenarios where bandwidth or storage is at a premium.
